missing.name: HSTS (HTTP Strict Transport Security)
missing.recommendation: Add header: Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload

missing.name: X-Frame-Options (Clickjacking Protection)
missing.recommendation: Add header: X-Frame-Options: DENY or SAMEORIGIN

missing.name: Content Security Policy (CSP)
missing.recommendation: Implement a Content-Security-Policy header to prevent XSS and data injection.

missing.name: X-XSS-Protection
missing.recommendation: Add header: X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block (legacy but still useful).

missing.name: Permissions Policy (Feature Policy)
missing.recommendation: Add Permissions-Policy header to control browser feature access (camera, mic, geolocation).
